articles.title: Robot Cars Freeze Up and Block Fire Trucks — First Responders Are Not Happy
articles.summary: Waymo's driverless cars are acting up in San Francisco and Austin, blocking fire stations and ignoring police. Firefighters say it's a safety problem. One 911 operator waited 53 minutes on Waymo's hotline!

articles.title: This Drone Folds Like a Book and Shoots Movie-Quality Video — Even If You Crash It!
articles.summary: The Hoverair X1 Promax is a tiny drone that fits in your pocket and films in 8K. It has 15 built-in flight tricks, so even beginners can get awesome shots. And it's tough — you can crash it and it bounces back!

articles.title: MIT and IBM Team Up to Build the Super-Smart Computers of the Future
articles.summary: MIT and IBM just launched a new lab to work on AI and quantum computers — machines that can solve problems today's computers can't. They'll tackle things like better weather forecasts and new medicines. Over 500 students have already helped out!
